steps.title: Find the sentence stating Adrastea's discovery year
steps.content: Look for Adrastea in the passage. You find: “scientists used the Voyager 1 space probe to discover Adrastea in 1979.”

steps.title: Match the year to the choices
steps.content: The other options either don't appear in the passage (1892, 2001) or refer to a different discovery (1610 for Io). That matches choice A — A is correct.
